subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up — I’d be happy to set up a meeting to explore a potential partnership. I can offer these windows (UTC):
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best, and I’ll confirm the meeting.

I’m not able to share direct internal contact details for the CTO or VP of Engineering. For public-facing information, please refer to our website.

Best,
[Your Name]
